title: Savory Algerian Baby Aubergine Stir-fry
description: A tender and flavorful meal-prep dish featuring toasted baby aubergines with a blend of spices making it both savory and delightful.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice the baby aubergine. Rinse them under running water.
Slice the red onion and chop the garlic cloves.
In a frying pan, heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced onions and cook until translucent.
Add garlic and cumin seeds to the onions for 20 seconds without letting them brown too much.
Fold in chopped baby aubergine pieces and sprinkle turmeric and salt evenly across them. Stir-fry until they start to turn golden brown on their edges.
Sprinkle with extra cumin powder and stir well.
Serve hot with couscous or over quinoa.
